title: coussapoa microcephala subsp. cornifolia
intro: Coussapoa microcephala subsp. cornifolia is a plant species belonging to the family Urticaceae, commonly known as the nettle family. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in tropical regions, due to its medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Coussapoa microcephala subsp. cornifolia include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as wound healing, fever reduction, and digestive system support. The plant can be used in herbal preparations like infusions, decoctions, or extracts, although more research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
